name: Peet Limited
analysis: PPC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7200, stop A$1.5939, target A$1.9600 (1.90:1) — then trail it.
